title: Project Services
intro: When you need a result rather than a resource, our project teams take full ownership — scoping, building and shipping against clear milestones and SLAs.

points.p: Dedicated pods that own scope, timeline and quality from kickoff to launch.
Predictable cost and milestones for well-defined initiatives.
Re-platforming and re-architecting legacy systems with zero-drama cutovers.

title: Captive Offshoring
tagline: Your own offshore team, stood up fast.
intro: Build a dedicated global capability center without the overhead. We assemble, house and operate your offshore team while you keep full control.

points.p: Stand up a team now, take ownership on your timeline.
Hiring, workspace, security and compliance handled end to end.
Global delivery economics with local accountability.

title: Staffing Services
tagline: The right specialist, exactly when you need them.
intro: From a single hard-to-find expert to a full squad, we place screened, role-ready talent that plugs straight into your team and roadmap.

points.p: Flexible engagement models that scale up or down with demand.
Permanent hires sourced, vetted and matched to your culture.
Pre-screened benches mean shortlists in days, not weeks.

title: AI / ML
intro: Production-grade machine learning, generative AI and intelligent automation — built to ship, monitor and scale, not just to demo.

points.p: RAG, copilots and agents grounded in your data, with guardrails.
Pipelines, MLOps and monitoring that keep models healthy in production.
Document, decision and workflow automation that compounds over time.

title: Digital Transformation
tagline: Reinvent products and operations around people.
intro: End-to-end reinvention of how you build, sell and serve — designed around the people who use your products every day.

points.p: Research-led product and service design that moves real metrics.
Streamline operations with automation and unified data.
Composable, API-first foundations built to evolve.

title: Cyber Security
intro: Zero-trust architecture, threat detection and governance that protect your customers, your data and your reputation.

points.p: Identity-first security designed for distributed teams.
Continuous monitoring with rapid containment.
Frameworks and controls mapped to your obligations.

title: Cloud Enablement
intro: Migration, modernization and FinOps that make the cloud work for you — resilient, cost-aware and ready to scale.

points.p: Pragmatic, low-risk moves to AWS, Azure and GCP.
Containers, serverless and IaC for speed and resilience.
Visibility and controls that keep cloud spend honest.

title: Emerging Talent
tagline: Trained, screened, ready from day one.
intro: A pipeline of mentored specialists — assessed and upskilled on modern stacks — ready to plug into your roadmap immediately.

points.p: Role-specific training aligned to your tech stack.
Assessed for skill and attitude, supported as they ramp.
A sustainable pipeline for long-term capacity.
